items.zh: OpenAI 新模型代号「土豆」曝光，不是 GPT-X！全新预训练架构，Sora 被弃用的原因浮出水面，正面回应与 Anthropic 的竞争
items.en: OpenAI's new model codenamed 'Potato' leaked — not GPT-X. Brand-new pretraining architecture revealed; Sora abandoned as company directly addresses competition with Anthropic

items.zh: Anthropic 收购生物科技公司 Coefficient Bio，交易额达 4 亿美元，加速 AI+生物领域布局
items.en: Anthropic acquires biotech startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal, accelerating AI+biology strategy

items.zh: Anthropic 成立政治行动委员会 (PAC)，在与特朗普政府的 AI 政策紧张关系中升级政治活动
items.en: Anthropic launches PAC amid tensions with Trump administration over AI policy

items.zh: 阿里千问 3.6 Plus 日调用量突破 1.4 万亿 Token，登顶全球模型调用量榜首
items.en: Alibaba Qwen 3.6 Plus breaks daily invocation record at 1.4 trillion tokens, tops global model usage chart

items.zh: OpenAI COO Brad Lightcap 转任领导「特别项目」，CEO Fidji Simo 因病休假，公司高层再次洗牌
items.en: OpenAI executive shuffle: COO Brad Lightcap moves to 'special projects'; CEO Fidji Simo takes medical leave

items.zh: Django 创始人警告：30 岁程序员受 AI 冲击最大，「快速做原型」的超能力已被 AI 取代
items.en: Django creator warns: 30-year-old developers hit hardest by AI — 'my superpower of rapid prototyping is now available to anyone'

items.zh: 中国芯片企业营收创历史新高，AI 热潮与美国出口管制双重驱动
items.en: Chinese chip firms hit record high revenue driven by the AI boom and U.S. export curbs

items.zh: 中国某城市发生大规模 Robotaxi 故障，无人出租车集体瘫痪导致交通堵塞
items.en: Mass robotaxi malfunction halts traffic in Chinese city

items.zh: AI 公司大量建设天然气发电厂为数据中心供电，环保隐忧浮现
items.en: AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers — what could go wrong?

items.zh: Oracle 进行大规模裁员，数千人失业；科技 CEO 越来越爱用 AI 做裁员借口
items.en: Oracle deep cuts: thousands lose their jobs. Tech CEOs increasingly blame AI for mass layoffs

items.zh: Linux 内核维护者崩溃：AI 每天狂塞 10 份漏洞报告，想摸会鱼都难
items.en: Linux kernel maintainers overwhelmed: AI floods them with 10 vulnerability reports daily

items.zh: Anthropic 表示 Claude Code 用户需为 OpenClaw 使用额外付费
items.en: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage

items.zh: Drift Protocol 遭 2.8 亿美元攻击，调查显示黑客「数月精心准备」
items.en: Drift Protocol $280M exploit took 'months of deliberate preparation'

items.zh: 加密行业面临「存在主义」Token 问题：供给远超价值创造速度
items.en: Crypto faces an 'existential' token problem as supply outpaces value creation

items.zh: BTC 空头面临 25 亿美元清算风险（$72K 水平），看跌社交情绪达 5 周新高
items.en: Bitcoin shorts risk $2.5B liquidation at $72K; bearish social chatter reaches 5-week high

items.zh: Tether 估值 5000 亿美元融资计划可能因需求不足而推迟
items.en: Tether may delay fundraising if demand falls short at $500B valuation: Report

items.zh: BTC 富豪交易者 2026 年 Q1 日均损失 3.37 亿美元
items.en: Rich Bitcoin traders lost $337M daily in first quarter of 2026

items.zh: 内华达州法官延长对 Kalshi 运营禁令，驳回「事件合约」辩护
items.en: Nevada judge extends ban on Kalshi, rejects event contract defense

items.zh: Polymarket 因舆论反弹撤下美国失踪飞行员投注市场
items.en: Polymarket takes down market on missing US pilot after backlash

items.zh: Telegram 创始人 Pavel Durov 称伊朗政府封禁 Telegram 反而适得其反
items.en: Telegram founder Pavel Durov says Iranian government's ban backfired

items.zh: 美国 3 月非农就业增加 17.8 万人，超出预期；失业率升至 4.3%
items.en: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%

items.zh: SpaceX 计划公开上市，估值或达万亿美元，剑指全球第六大上市公司——马斯克的史上最大 IPO 来了
items.en: SpaceX set to be worth $1 trillion with planned public listing — Musk's biggest IPO ever

items.zh: 美伊冲突「战争税」开始冲击美国企业和消费者；亚马逊对卖家加征「燃油附加费」
items.en: U.S.-Iran war 'tax' hits American businesses; Amazon adds 'fuel surcharge' for sellers as global energy markets roiled

items.zh: Warsh 提名推进，特朗普的两套美联储计划正走向碰撞
items.en: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course

items.zh: Apple 50 岁了：前内部人士说 iPhone 制造商「浪费了 5 年 AI 领先优势」，但仍有机会翻盘
items.en: Apple at 50: The iPhone maker 'blew a 5-year lead' on AI, but former insiders say it can still win

items.zh: 巴菲特可能因盖茨与爱泼斯坦的关系而终止对盖茨基金会的捐赠
items.en: Buffett may end donations to Gates charity over Bill's ties to Epstein

items.zh: PS5 因全球「压力」涨价 90 英镑
items.en: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
